name: Electrocute
description: You send an almost instantaneous bolt of electricity towards a target within a short (10 unit) distance, dealing 10 electric damage if your spell check beats the target's defense. If the target is within a very short (5 unit) range, they suffer a -2 penalty to their defense.
charge: If the damage is not mitigated at all, the target must also make a concentration check against your spell check or become stunned.
